title: Ex-Chhattisgarh Chief Minister Ajit Jogi's Son Gets Life Term In 2003 Murder Case
description: In a major development in one of Chhattisgarh's most high-profile political murder cases, the Chhattisgarh High Court has sentenced former MLA Amit Jogi to life imprisonment in the 2003 killing of NCP leader Ramavatar Jaggi.
